lanes.name: The Living Cellar
lanes.narrative: The cellar is first a taste journal, second a bottle inventory — build the intelligence for both in that order, and deliver it through the email channel already in hand.

lanes.name: The Hunt
lanes.narrative: Two halves of the same obsession — a passive radar that fires when the camera finds a wanted bottle, and an active agent that goes to work when you cannot wait to stumble.

lanes.name: At the Table
lanes.narrative: Expand Pocket Somm from single-dish pairing into full dining intelligence — from a restaurant wine list to a dinner party program to an open conversation about any bottle.

lanes.name: The Home Bar
lanes.narrative: Move SommSavvy into the home — a living shelf inventory that unlocks a creative cocktail partner who works with what is actually on the shelf.

lanes.name: Know Your Drink
lanes.narrative: Build the reference layer an enthusiast actually reaches for — contextual lessons that assume existing knowledge, definitive regional writing, and immersive pour-along experiences.
